evals.name: missing-tests
evals.prompt: Review a PR that satisfies the UI spec visually but has no tests for changed behavior.
evals.expected_output: Blocks or should-fixes missing tests with evidence.

evals.name: ui-review
evals.prompt: Review a dashboard UI PR with no accessibility or responsive evidence.

evals.name: debug-near-miss
evals.prompt: CI is red on this branch; find why.
evals.expected_output: Routes to debug rather than performing release/review readiness.
